title: Evangelion Rap nice beat
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Rap~ nice beat.             Quote Post by KLVTZ » Sun Jul 25, 2010 3:46 pm Thought fans would like this, it ain't bad http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aHFWf3eH1II (Lyrics) This depression is getting beside me Watashi wa Shinji Ikari As long as Ayanami Rei's the one who's sitting beside me Not Asuka, asking her, don't talk about the massacre... in front of pen pen ain't talking bout the second impact or staring at Misato by the train before i went back I'm only 14, I'm asking where's the men at cause i'm fighting angels, looking like a devil when I'm in that I miss my mother she died when i was so young yet, I feel comfort when i pilot eva 0-1 by the time you blink your eyes, I've already synchronized but i'm scared, I just hope this thing would die at the school they're calling me a hero, i'm just going to work lose the ego, going berserk daddy issues you know that it hurts when they're up on you ... on on you... At the school Toji's mad at me, but they could have been casualties Nerv had the nerve to start this instrumentality 5 minutes to fight, left with the internal battery waiting for the next angel to battle me around Ayanami, I am not me, snap out of it I love you in that plug suit and i'm proud of it Asuka, whether Soryuuu or Shikinami feels like she's not a doll and she misses mommy so sleep next to me, I feel like everyone is testing me ran away for three days, now Katsuragi's vexed with me big guns, prog knife, i carry all this weaponry I feel so alone and they're telling me it's destiny? I know what's best for me especially when my own father doesn't bother to get next to me Seele will conceal the dead sea scrolls that determine our future, but i'll never see those Adding Adam and Lillith the story happens to finish with a big bang, humanity will diminish they'll see hell, in a big pool of LCL or we can live life it all seems well complicated plot you're way beyond getting the price that you pay watching Neon Genesis Evangelion, it's time to put the telly on to watch this masterpiece so Arigato Anno-san

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Sun Jul 25, 2010 3:54 pm I'm actually quite surprised. The guy had a decent flow and narrated parts of the series quite well.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Jul 25, 2010 4:17 pm This turned out to be a lot better then I thought it would be.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Jul 25, 2010 7:36 pm Lyrics are terrible.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Sun Jul 25, 2010 8:24 pm I actually don't find this very smooth at all. The lyrics are kind of arbitrary as well, like an effort to cram in as many references as possible. I don't really feel the MC's passion. Nice production, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Sun Jul 25, 2010 10:14 pm That whole "watshi wa Shinji Ikari" line was extremely awkward and offsetting, but I felt like it improved after the Asuka line. From what I could tell. I didn't bother to listen to the whole thing, actually.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sun Jul 25, 2010 10:16 pm I ususally hate rap, but for some reason I really liked that. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Jul 25, 2010 10:26 pm These lyrics are hilariously bad. He might as well have written it as a limerick. Ultraklystron has done some lyrics inspired by NGE. They're similarly goofy, but I don't think they're quite this terrible. ..okay, yes they are. http://ultraklystron.bandcamp.com/track/pilot The refrain and second verse of this track are about NGE. The first verse is Mobile Suit Gundam, the bridge is FLCL. It's pretty dorky, but rapping directly about anime pretty inherently is. v.1 Universal Century Double O 79 Rollin in a Gundam and I'm feelin fine Protect my friends who also roll mobile suits Protect the White Base with a power you can't refute Newtype skills and I don't even know it yet More exact than blaster of Boba Fette Goal in life is to destroy the Red Comet Hop on the launchers and it's one two ready set a Young pilot wins battles take lives Soon filled with a world of pain inside When not fighting I'll always mope and cry Morning the victims regardless of the side A battle that seems to have no end Two broken hearts that can't seem to mend I wish I could go back and change the past I wish sometimes I wasn't so skilled and fast ch. I mustn't run away but I want to Let me go through, with what I want to do Position target in the center pull the switch This life is plain and I really want to quit (repeat) v.2 2015 and the angels are back again And all I want to do is just hang with my friends But my otasan won't have any of that He wants me to come at drop of a hat I'm sick in tired of the life I live I'm sick in tired of how much I have to give Given the chance I'll rebuild the world It'll just be me and a redhead girl If anyone else wants to come back from the sea They are welcome to it's ok with me But if no else really has the strength then I'll just sit here and become pure angst I remember when the days were long I remember when I listened to songs But now because of me that world is gone Atleast I'm the king and no longer a pawn (ch.) br. Straight outta Mabase My world isn't OK Robots pop out my head all day like maybe Robot Keiji K Seems I'm going some what insane Seems I've lost my entire brain Beneath the bandage lies a shame Metaphor via baseball game (ch. x 2)

[]:             Quote Post by facespace » Sun Jul 25, 2010 11:07 pm The first 4 lines weren't great. They didn't flow well. But the rest is good. The samples from the show were not helpful to the song. They seemed to distract me from what he was trying to say. Silly.

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Mon Jul 26, 2010 5:48 pm esselfortium wrote: v.2 2015 and the angels are back again And all I want to do is just hang with my friends But my otasan won't have any of that He wants me to come at drop of a hat I'm sick in tired of the life I live I'm sick in tired of how much I have to give Given the chance I'll rebuild the world It'll just be me and a redhead girl If anyone else wants to come back from the sea They are welcome to it's ok with me But if no else really has the strength then I'll just sit here and become pure angst I remember when the days were long I remember when I listened to songs But now because of me that world is gone Atleast I'm the king and no longer a pawn (ch.) br. Straight outta Mabase My world isn't OK Robots pop out my head all day like maybe Robot Keiji K Seems I'm going some what insane Seems I've lost my entire brain Beneath the bandage lies a shame Metaphor via baseball game (ch. x 2)

[]:             Quote Post by Born of Lilith » Sun Aug 08, 2010 6:43 pm Sounds like Kanye West, haha. I kinda dig it.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Aug 08, 2010 9:09 pm Nerv had the nerve to start this Instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Mon Aug 09, 2010 12:01 am The only good Eva rap is Gendo's Paradise. Period.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Mon Aug 09, 2010 3:34 am This one's made six years ago, while I was working on LW Season 1. I liked Cypress Hill's Rap Superstar that I tweaked the lyrics: (Asuka Speaking) Most people think that it's fun to be a Pilot. I put on a smile I tell them I'm strong, I'm brave I tell the people I'll save the world. But they don't know what's for real. It's pain. It ain't fun. I know this because I realized after I woke up on one morning That I was mistaken to be here And it isn't worth it for me to be a Pilot. (B-Real) So you wanna be a rap superstar And live large a big house 1 unit, you're in charge Comin up in the world Don't trust nobody Gotta look over your shoulder constantly (B-Real) I remember the days when i was a young kid growin up Lookin in the mirror dreamin about blowin up To rock crowds make money Chill with the fans Sign autographs and whatever the people want from me Shits funny How impossible cream manifest in the games that be comin with it Never the less you gotta go for the gusto But you don't know about the blood sweat and tears and losin some of your peers And losin some of your self To the months past by Hopefully you don't manifest for the wrong guy Egomaniac in the brainiac Don't know how to act Shits deep One Angel attack I had my head cracked Sign a deal with the devil wanna make a mill But never will Till the Pilot crosses over still Feelin no hate But fantasies come wit these Just to sacrifice the taste of makin cheese You wanna be a rap superstar in the biz And take shit from people who don't know what it is I wish it was all fun and games But the price of fame is high And some can't pay to play Trapped in what you fighting about Tell me what happened when you lost clout The rout you took started collapsing No fans No fame No respect No change No life And everyone shits on your name (Chorus) So you wanna be a rap superstar And live large A big house 1 Unit The gun's charged Comin up in the world don't trust nobody Gotta look over your shoulder constantly To be a rap superstar And live large A big house 1 unit The gun's charged Comin up in the world don't trust nobody Gotta look over your shoulder constantly (Shinji Speaking) When you agree to be a Pilot You don't know that you signed your life over And my father doesn't care about you 'Cause the minute you fall off They'll find another Pilot And they'll find another Child And they'll find someone like me So you need to just keep... Stacking your chips up Do what you got to do while you're synched And get out of the game Be a runaway But running away is even worse Because if the world's doomed And you can't do anything Then it really hurts And everyone dies. (Rei Speaking) No matter what you just been through What I must do should be right I remind myself what relations I have I have to live through the pain But I cannot withstand the color red I know it is not pleasant to be a Child However I must follow orders Fight to my life's end But at that end I will be useless I return to nothing. (Chorus) (B-Real) My own father don't know me Sittin up in my room so lonely But I thank god I'm wit my homies But sometimes I wish I was back home But only no radio or videos Cuz they show me no love The phony gotta hit the road slowly So the going gets lonely I'm in the middle like monie And the press say that My own people disowned me And the best way back Is to keep your head straight Never inflate the cranium Your crew worried about them honies at the paladium Who just wanna cling on swing on And so on and go on and fall off The hoes fall off To the next rap superstar Wit no shame give him a year And they'll be right out the game The same as the last one Who came before him Gained fame Started gettin ignored I warned him Assured him This ain't easy take it from weezy Sleezy people wanna be cheesey They talkin evil "assassin, assassin" (Chorus)

It's pretty dorky, but rapping directly about anime pretty inherently is. v.1 Universal Century Double O 79 Rollin in a Gundam and I'm feelin fine Protect my friends who also roll mobile suits Protect the White Base with a power you can't refute Newtype skills and I don't even know it yet More exact than blaster of Boba Fette Goal in life is to destroy the Red Comet Hop on the launchers and it's one two ready set a Young pilot wins battles take lives Soon filled with a world of pain inside When not fighting I'll always mope and cry Morning the victims regardless of the side A battle that seems to have no end Two broken hearts that can't seem to mend I wish I could go back and change the past I wish sometimes I wasn't so skilled and fast ch. I mustn't run away but I want to Let me go through, with what I want to do Position target in the center pull the switch This life is plain and I really want to quit (repeat) v.2 2015 and the angels are back again And all I want to do is just hang with my friends But my otasan won't have any of that He wants me to come at drop of a hat I'm sick in tired of the life I live I'm sick in tired of how much I have to give Given the chance I'll rebuild the world It'll just be me and a redhead girl If anyone else wants to come back from the sea They are welcome to it's ok with me But if no else really has the strength then I'll just sit here and become pure angst I remember when the days were long I remember when I listened to songs But now because of me that world is gone Atleast I'm the king and no longer a pawn (ch.) br. Article: Evangelion Rap nice beat
.assassin » Mon Aug 09, 2010 3:34 am This one's made six years ago, while I was working on LW Season 1. I liked Cypress Hill's Rap Superstar that I tweaked the lyrics: (Asuka Speaking) Most people think that it's fun to be a Pilot. I put on a smile I tell them I'm strong, I'm brave I tell the people I'll save the world. But they don't know what's for real. It's pain. It ain't fun. I know this because I realized after I woke up on one morning That I was mistaken to be here And it isn't worth it for me to be a Pilot. (B-Real) So you wanna be a rap superstar And live large a big house 1 unit, you're in charge Comin up in the world Don't trust nobody Gotta look over your shoulder constantly (B-Real) I remember the days when i was a young kid growin up Lookin in the mirror dreamin about blowin up To rock crowds make money Chill with the fans Sign autographs and whatever the people want from me Shits funny How impossible cream manifest in the games that be comin with it Never the less you gotta go for the gusto But you don't know about the blood sweat and tears and losin some of your peers And losin some of your self To the months past by Hopefully you don't manifest for the wrong guy Egomaniac in the brainiac Don't know how to act Shits deep One Angel attack I had my head cracked Sign a deal with the devil wanna make a mill But never will Till the Pilot crosses over still Feelin no hate But fantasies come wit these Just to sacrifice the taste of makin cheese You wanna be a rap superstar in the biz And take shit from people who don't know what it is I wish it was all fun and games But the price of fame is high And some can't pay to play Trapped in what you fighting about Tell me what happened when you lost clout The rout you took started collapsing No fans No fame No respect No change No life And everyone shits on your name (Chorus) So you wanna be a rap superstar And live large A big house 1 Unit The gun's charged Comin up in the world don't trust nobody Gotta look over your shoulder constantly To be a rap superstar And live large A big house 1 unit The gun's charged Comin up in the world don't trust nobody G

Article: Evangelion Rap nice beat
 The gun's charged Comin up in the world don't trust nobody Gotta look over your shoulder constantly To be a rap superstar And live large A big house 1 unit The gun's charged Comin up in the world don't trust nobody Gotta look over your shoulder constantly (Shinji Speaking) When you agree to be a Pilot You don't know that you signed your life over And my father doesn't care about you 'Cause the minute you fall off They'll find another Pilot And they'll find another Child And they'll find someone like me So you need to just keep... Stacking your chips up Do what you got to do while you're synched And get out of the game Be a runaway But running away is even worse Because if the world's doomed And you can't do anything Then it really hurts And everyone dies. (Rei Speaking) No matter what you just been through What I must do should be right I remind myself what relations I have I have to live through the pain But I cannot withstand the color red I know it is not pleasant to be a Child However I must follow orders Fight to my life's end But at that end I will be useless I return to nothing. (Chorus) (B-Real) My own father don't know me Sittin up in my room so lonely But I thank god I'm wit my homies But sometimes I wish I was back home But only no radio or videos Cuz they show me no love The phony gotta hit the road slowly So the going gets lonely I'm in the middle like monie And the press say that My own people disowned me And the best way back Is to keep your head straight Never inflate the cranium Your crew worried about them honies at the paladium Who just wanna cling on swing on And so on and go on and fall off The hoes fall off To the next rap superstar Wit no shame give him a year And they'll be right out the game The same as the last one Who came before him Gained fame Started gettin ignored I warned him Assured him This ain't easy take it from weezy Sleezy people wanna be cheesey They talkin evil "assassin, assassin" (Chorus)
